calendar.matters:
Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgement Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jun-26-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-29-2017 Vacated

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.
Mark F. Anderson, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Noel Villalobos, father and guardian ad litem for Minor Bryan Villalobos, also present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined with the assistance of Ruben Guerra as Spanish interpreter.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $22,222.00
Attorney's Fees: $5,071.00 payable to Anderson, Ogilvie, & Brewer LLP.
Costs: $1,936.00
A net balance of $15,215.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at First Republic Bank, 44 Montgomery Street, San Francisco, CA 94104 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor's Compromise and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on September 12, 2017 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Department 514 prior to Hearing.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Set For Trial On Jul-03-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
